title: Remove profile setup popup, update headline, and fix admin login

requirements.summary: Remove the ProfileSetup modal so it no longer appears after login or anywhere in the application
acceptanceCriteria: The ProfileSetup modal/dialog does not appear after a user logs in.
No 'Set up your profile' prompt is shown anywhere in the app.
The ProfileSetup component is either removed or never rendered.

file_operations.description: Remove the ProfileSetup component import and remove all logic that conditionally renders the ProfileSetup modal. Remove the showProfileSetup state derivation and the ProfileSetup JSX element from the render tree.
Delete the ProfileSetup component file as it is no longer needed in the application.

requirements.summary: Update the main hero headline to display 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations'
acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section displays 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations' as the main headline.
The headline is visually prominent and styled consistently with the existing hero design.

file_operations.description: Update the primary headline text in the Hero section to display 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations'. Preserve all existing styling and layout while changing only the headline text content.

requirements.summary: Replace Internet Identity authentication in the admin panel with a hardcoded username/password login form using credentials admin/admin123
acceptanceCriteria: The admin panel shows a login form with username and password fields instead of (or before) Internet Identity login.
Entering 'admin' / 'admin123' grants access to the admin dashboard.
Entering incorrect credentials shows an error message (e.g., 'Access Denied' or 'Invalid credentials').
After successful login, the admin panel content is fully accessible.
The admin session persists until the user logs out.

file_operations.description: Replace the Internet Identity authentication flow with a hardcoded username/password login form. Add local state for username, password, authentication status, and error messages. Implement form validation that checks username === 'admin' and password === 'admin123'. Show 'Access Denied' or 'Invalid credentials' error for incorrect credentials. Use sessionStorage or localStorage to persist the admin session. Conditionally render either the login form or the admin dashboard content based on authentication status. Add a logout button that clears the session and returns to the login form.

Update the conditional logic for showing the 'Inquiries' admin link to check the new hardcoded admin authentication state instead of the Internet Identity isAdmin check. Ensure the link only appears when the user has successfully logged in with the hardcoded credentials.
